items.title: Newcastle suffer ANOTHER transfer blow as move for World Cup star is hijacked at final hurdle by Premier League rivals
items.summary: ASTON VILLA have swooped to hijack Newcastle’s deal for Swiss star Johan Manzambi. Attacking midfielder Manzambi, 20, was a stand-out performer for Switzerland in the World Cup — weighing in with three goals and two assists on his nation’s run to the quarter-finals. items.title: Borrowed shoes, no Golden Boot - the story of the World Cup's greatest scorer
items.summary: Just Fontaine's record of 13 goals in a single World Cup has stood for decades, but he never played in the tournament again after injury ended his career at the age of 28.
